purpose: We build intelligent manufacturing and digital systems that turn efficiency and circularity into measurable, regenerative impact.
mission: To democratize AI and advanced manufacturing across LATAM—accelerating productivity, circular material flows, and trustworthy data practices—so every project delivers business value and measurable social and environmental gains.
vision: An industrial ecosystem in Latin America that is net-positive—where AI amplifies human creativity, supply chains regenerate local economies, and materials cycle with near-zero waste.

circularity.title: Circular by Design
circularity.body: Reduce waste, extend product life, and design for reuse and remanufacture across programs and factories.

traceability.title: Impact, Traceable
traceability.body: Embed social/environmental impact tracking (S/E/G) in every engagement with transparent dashboards.

ethicalData.title: Ethical & Privacy-First Data
ethicalData.body: Secure-by-default platforms, minimal data collection, and open audit trails.

latamTalent.title: LATAM Talent & Prosperity
latamTalent.body: Upskill teams, strengthen local suppliers, and expand high-value jobs in the region.

messaging.valueProposition: Every MADFAM unit is designed to solve specific industry problems with maximum specialization and efficiency

hero.title: Transform Operations with AI—From Strategy to Production
hero.subtitle: We turn operational challenges into regenerative growth through intelligent systems that optimize efficiency, close material loops, and amplify human creativity across LATAM.

pitch.title: Building the future of work
pitch.description: At Aureo Labs we develop tools that enhance productivity and automate complex processes. Our platforms integrate AI, automation and exceptional user experience to create solutions that truly matter.

penny.description: User-friendly AI chat and workbench platform for consumers and enterprises. Your intelligent assistant for everyday tasks and business automation.
penny.audience: Consumers and businesses of all sizes

cotizaStudio.description: Intelligent quotation and budgeting system with complete sales process automation.

forgeSight.description: Enterprise-grade pricing intelligence platform that continuously harvests, normalizes, and benchmarks prices across the global digital fabrication industry.
forgeSight.audience: Digital fabrication companies, 3D printing services, and procurement teams

features.0: AI-powered price discovery from 1000+ vendors globally
features.1: Real-time statistical benchmarking (p10/p50/p90) by material and region
features.2: Enterprise security with OAuth2/JWT and comprehensive audit trails

dhanam.description: Wealth and finance platform purpose-built for LATAM founders. Unifies personal and business budgeting with ESG insight.

avala.description: SaaS platform for designing, delivering, and verifying competency-based training aligned with Mexican EC/CONOCER standards. Generates DC-3 certificates and ensures regulatory compliance.
avala.audience: Training organizations and enterprises in LATAM

features.1: DC-3 certificate generation and SIRCE compliance

enclii.description: Our own sovereign PaaS powering MADFAM's entire infrastructure. GitOps-native, Kubernetes-based, built for teams that need deployment sovereignty.
enclii.audience: Development teams and organizations requiring sovereign cloud

janua.description: Self-hosted identity platform with enterprise SSO, SCIM provisioning, MFA, and Passkeys. The authentication layer for every MADFAM product. Open source (AGPL-3.0).

philosophy.quote: Innovation is not just technology, it's solving real problems in unexpected ways

primavera3d.description: Full-stack digital fabrication studio: parametric design tools (Yantra4D, SIM4D), geometry analysis (Geom-Core), automated quoting (Cotiza Studio), and manufacturing execution (Pravara-MES). Home of the 40+ open-source parametric design commons.

yantra4d.name: Yantra4D
yantra4d.description: Web platform for parametric OpenSCAD models. Upload designs, get instant 3D previews, export STL files. Powers 40+ open-source parametric designs.

badges.aureoLabsProduct: by Aureo Labs, a MADFAM Company

poweredBy.title: Powered by Our Own Stack
poweredBy.subtitle: We eat our own cooking. Every product we build, we use.
poweredBy.description: This website runs on Enclii (our sovereign PaaS), authenticates with Janua (our identity platform), quotes with Cotiza Studio, and tracks with Forge Sight. When we say our tools work in production, we mean it—because we depend on them every day.

openSource.title: Built in the Open
openSource.subtitle: 60+ public repositories. We build in the open and contribute to the commons.
openSource.description: From Janua (AGPL-3.0 identity platform) to Yantra4D Commons (40+ parametric designs free for anyone to use), we believe open source is how real infrastructure gets built. Our code is our resume.

bitsToAtoms.title: From Bits to Atoms
bitsToAtoms.subtitle: A complete pipeline from sovereign cloud to physical manufacturing.
bitsToAtoms.description: MADFAM's ecosystem connects the entire value chain: sovereign cloud infrastructure (Enclii) → identity and access (Janua) → parametric design (Yantra4D) → manufacturing execution (Pravara-MES) → financial intelligence (Dhanam). From software to hardware, from bits to atoms.

research.title: Research & Incubation
research.description: Beyond our core products, MADFAM operates research initiatives in legal-tech, electrochemistry, community logistics, and more. Not every project becomes a product—but every project teaches us something.
